title: Yabancı Diller Bölümü İngilizce Hazırlık Programı Oryantasyonu

Duyurular Detay

English Preparatory Orientation September 23, 2024, at 14:00 Conference Hall

For English Preparatory Students, there will be an orientation on Monday, September 23rd at 14:00 in the Conference Hall of Block A (Rectorship) at the Galata Campus, with the participation of all English Preparatory instructors. It is important for students to attend in order to gather information about the preparatory program.

DİĞER DUYURULAR
